basic_details.job_title: ERNET Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Education and Research Network India (ERNET) Project Engineer Notification 2026 has been released recently on the official website https://www.ernet.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ERNET Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/EWS.

qualification.details: Project Engineer Level 2: Full-time B.Tech/BE/MCA/M.Sc. or equivalent in Electronics/Information Technology/Electronics & Communication/Telecommunication/Computer Science/Computer Application/Instrumentation/Physics. Minimum 3 years post-qualification experience (B.Tech/BE/MCA/M.Sc.) or 1 year (M.Tech/M.E.). Project Engineer Level 1: Full-time B.Tech/BE/MCA/M.Sc. or equivalent in Electronics/Information Technology/Electronics & Communication/Telecommunication/Computer Science/Computer Application/Instrumentation/Physics.

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Interview Proficiency test/additional interview if required
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ERNET Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ERNET Project Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ERNET Project Engineer positions is 13th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Engineer position at Education and Research Network India (ERNET). These vacancies are distributed across different levels as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for Project Engineer Level 2?
faq.answer: For Project Engineer Level 2, candidates need a full-time B.Tech/BE/MCA/M.Sc. or equivalent degree in specific fields and require 3 years of post-qualification experience or 1 year for M.Tech/M.E.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ERNET Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for the ERNET Project Engineer positions. Candidates can apply without any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the Project Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Engineer posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 50,000, depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Project Engineer positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview. A proficiency test or an additional interview may also be conducted if deemed necessary.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the ERNET Project Engineer recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with necessary documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page. It is highly recommended to read the PDF thoroughly before applying.
